entries.name: scrapin-aint-easy:scrapin-algo
entries.intent: Query the algorithm library for implementations, patterns, and complexity analysis

entries.name: scrapin-aint-easy:scrapin-crawl
entries.intent: Trigger a documentation crawl for a specific source or all sources

entries.name: scrapin-aint-easy:scrapin-diff
entries.intent: Show documentation changes since the last crawl for a source

entries.name: scrapin-aint-easy:scrapin-drift
entries.intent: Run drift detection — codebase API drift and agent prompt drift

entries.name: scrapin-aint-easy:scrapin-search
entries.intent: Search the documentation knowledge graph for symbols, concepts, or patterns

entries.name: scrapin-aint-easy:scrapin-setup
entries.intent: Interactive project setup — conducts a thorough interview then generates complete Claude Code configuration

entries.name: scrapin-aint-easy:scrapin-status
entries.intent: Show overall system status — graph health, cron jobs, drift summary
